headings.style: Geometric, highly tracked, sharp. Use font-light to font-black for extreme contrast.

accents.labels: uppercase text-xs md:text-sm tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-[#3E5748]

grid_modes.gallery: Grid Mode A (Tetris) - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Mix col-span-8, col-span-4 to create asymmetry.
grid_modes.menu: Grid Mode B (Control Room) - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6. Dense, structured.

gallery.usage: Featured image in menu or gallery large tile
About section parallax or gallery tile

gallery.alt: Empty cafe seating with warm lighting
gallery.usage: Location/Hours section background or gallery tile

motion_interactions.scrolling: MANDATORY: Use `lenis` for smooth scrolling. This is critical for the 3D scroll-driven video feel.
motion_interactions.hero_video: The 3D boba video must act as the primary scroll-driven element. It should be sticky (`position: sticky`) in the hero section, scaling or translating slightly via Framer Motion's `useScroll` as the user scrolls down, transitioning from a massive hero centerpiece to an adjacent visual for the About section.
motion_interactions.parallax: Use Framer Motion `useScroll` and `useTransform` to add subtle y-axis parallax to gallery images.
motion_interactions.reveals: Staggered fade-up text reveals for headings (`opacity: 0`, `y: 40`).
motion_interactions.cursor: Custom dot cursor (Deep Green or Amber) using Framer Motion to follow mouse.

navigation.elements: Center logo text 'HAUS OF BOBA'. Left/Right nav links. Primary Order button.

hero.layout: 100vh height. Massive typography 'HAUS OF BOBA' layered behind or intertwined with the 3D Boba Video. The video is front-and-center, edge-to-edge or massive floating element.
hero.video_handling: Use `<video autoPlay loop muted playsInline>` inside a Framer Motion sticky container.

about.layout: Scroll-linked text. 'Good Tea - Good Time - All The Time.' Video from hero unpins and rests next to this section, or section scrolls over it.
about.visuals: Generous negative space. Parallax interior image.

marquee.content: FRESHLY BREWED BOBA TEA & COFFEE — TAIYAKI — SMOOTHIES —
marquee.style: Huge outline text (`text-transparent stroke-[#1A3627] stroke-1`), slow continuous movement.

menu.layout: Structured Bento Grid. Categories: Milk Teas, Fruit Teas, Smoothies, Coffees, Signatures, Snacks.
menu.card_style: 1px solid `border-[#1A3627]/20`, `bg-[#FDFBF7]`, hover lifts slightly. NO heavy drop shadows. High contrast text.
menu.prices: Right aligned, dotted line leaders if possible.

reviews.layout: Large emotional typographic quotes. 4.4 Stars (317 Reviews). Subtle background grain or color shift to Surface (#F4F1EA).

footer.layout: High Contrast. Background: `#1A3627` (Deep Green), Text: `#FDFBF7` (Cream). Massive 'HAUS OF BOBA' logo or typography at bottom. Address, Phone, Hours, Links.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure Deep Green against Cream meets APCA standards.
